relations.note: Line height minimum constraints apply on top of the established type scale definitions.

quotes: Nunito Sans (Google font), bolder weights, Title Case
Email font stack (CSS): `'Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif`
Nunito Sans (Google font), bolder weights, Title Case; *Agenda may be used as live text in digital for the campaign headline only*

Email font stack (CSS): `'Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif`. Nunito Sans must be loaded via `@font-face`/Google Fonts link where the client supports it; the stack guarantees graceful fallback in Outlook

rules.intent: Maintain cross-client typographic consistency while preserving brand identity.
rules.rule_text: Email typography must use the Nunito Sans font stack ('Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif) with fallback handling, applying Title Case to headlines and headers. Agenda is permitted as live text for campaign headlines only.

quotes: H1 (section hero headline): 28px / 36px (≈130%), Nunito Sans ExtraBold or Bold
H3 (subhead): 18px / 26px (≈144%), Nunito Sans Bold or SemiBold
Body: 16px / 24px (150%), Nunito Sans Regular — 16px is the brand-mandated minimum for body copy
H1 (section hero headline): 28px / 36px (≈130%), Nunito Sans ExtraBold or Bold
16px is the brand-mandated minimum for body copy ("bigger is better")
Never use two adjacent text blocks at the same size+weight to signal different hierarchy levels.

rules.intent: Maintain a robust, readable typographic hierarchy across all digital templates.
rules.rule_text: Set visual hierarchy using the standard digital type scale: H1 (28px / 36px), H2 (22px / 30px), H3 (18px / 26px), Body (16px / 24px), Secondary Body (14px / 21px), and Footnotes (12px / 18px). Body copy must not fall below the brand-mandated minimum of 16px, and running text must never fall below 12px.

quotes: Line height: minimum 150% for all body copy
Line height: minimum 150% for all body copy (brand accessibility rule). For light text on dark backgrounds, increase further — [GENERAL] use 160% (e.g., 16px/26px).

rules.intent: Ensure optimal readability and legibility on both light and dark backgrounds.
rules.rule_text: Body copy line-height must be a minimum of 150% (line_height.accessibility.body_min = 150%) to satisfy brand accessibility rules. For light text on dark backgrounds, line-height should be increased to 160% (e.g., 16px/26px).
